name: arc
description: Central issue tracker for AI-assisted coding workflows. Manage tasks, track work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

interface.shortDescription: Track multi-session coding work with durable issues
interface.longDescription: Use arc to manage durable issues, plans, dependencies, and implementation workflows across long-running coding sessions. Codex support keeps project context primed automatically at session start and before compaction so work can resume cleanly.
defaultPrompt: Show me the best unblocked arc task and onboard me to it
Break this approved design into arc tasks with exact file paths
Review my current arc issue and tell me the next safe step
